title: Why does my New Portfolio not collect all the workload across the associated projects?
excerpt: I have a portfolio with associated projects in it. I added a workload to track my resources in the portfolio. However, nothing shows up. Works fine at the project level or in widgets on my dashboard. I don’t think the Po…

posts.author: pumbarger (Patrick Umbarger)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a portfolio with associated projects in it. I added a workload to track my resources in the portfolio. However, nothing shows up. Works fine at the project level or in widgets on my dashboard. I don’t think the Portfolio is picking up the “People” in the projects.
